#  Open Specifications 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * Viewing a specific Specifications Area exports only the specifications related to that particular 'Specification Area'.


##  Steps 
### Open a Single Specification Section
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click **Open** next to the specification section.
  3. Take any of the following actions:
     * Click the **X** icon to exit the PDF viewer.
     * Click the **download**![Icon Download Arrow2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7eeae138f1d46232631c7eff9305785a/39f2f23e3169392f38cc1767f50e3052/icon-download-arrow2.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to download the file.
     * Click the **list** ![Icon List View 1](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/aa956a75137ae4a63e6984e99e24dcaf/07de40ab917a278fcb073ce230e67dd7/icon-list-view-1.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon to navigate to different divisions or sections.
     * Click the **search** ![Icon Search](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0e1287800ad9e8908deec3df3b65ebd0/c5fc5af3e51b77953edf62739fba7b2c/icon-search.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to perform a keyword search.
     * Click the **zoom in**![Icon Zoom In Magnifying Glass](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a1aa25cb6a61797e2b5c466c79d54305/db43e4cba7855795fa3a24778c472eab/icon-zoom-in-magnifying-glass.png?fm=webp&h=20) or **zoom out**![Icon Zoom Out Magnifying Glass](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e49a27d7449d36b860ac2d5995808359/11e640e3efa23ce67ffa30b97d003644/icon-zoom-out-magnifying-glass.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon to zoom in or out.


### Open Entire Specification Book
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click **Open Specifications Book**.  
Note: This shows only the most recently published revision of each specification section.
  3. Take any of the following actions:
     * Click the **X** icon to exit the PDF viewer.
     * Click the **download**![Icon Download Arrow2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7eeae138f1d46232631c7eff9305785a/39f2f23e3169392f38cc1767f50e3052/icon-download-arrow2.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to download the file.
     * Click the **list** ![Icon List View 1](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/aa956a75137ae4a63e6984e99e24dcaf/07de40ab917a278fcb073ce230e67dd7/icon-list-view-1.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon to navigate to different divisions or sections.
     * Click the **search** ![Icon Search](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0e1287800ad9e8908deec3df3b65ebd0/c5fc5af3e51b77953edf62739fba7b2c/icon-search.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to perform a keyword search.
     * Click the **zoom in**![Icon Zoom In Magnifying Glass](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a1aa25cb6a61797e2b5c466c79d54305/db43e4cba7855795fa3a24778c472eab/icon-zoom-in-magnifying-glass.png?fm=webp&h=20) or **zoom out**![Icon Zoom Out Magnifying Glass](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e49a27d7449d36b860ac2d5995808359/11e640e3efa23ce67ffa30b97d003644/icon-zoom-out-magnifying-glass.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon to zoom in or out.


## See Also
  * [Search for and Filter Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-specifications)
  * [View Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-specifications)
  * [Email Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/email-specifications)
title: Open Specifications
description: How to open and view a specification PDF in Procore.
